actions: Adopt low-glycemic meals with controlled carbohydrate portions
Increase fiber intake to at least 25g daily
Limit refined sugars and sweetened beverages
Perform 150 minutes/week of moderate aerobic activity
Add resistance training at least 2 sessions per week
Maintain consistent sleep and wake times

medication_suggestions.name: Metformin (evaluation required)
medication_suggestions.note: First-line option in many T2DM patients, clinician to confirm suitability

actions: Improve sleep hygiene and avoid late caffeine

medication_suggestions.name: No routine medication
medication_suggestions.note: Lifestyle modification is preferred; clinician may evaluate metformin in select cases

actions: Reduce saturated fat and ultra-processed foods
Increase intake of vegetables, lean proteins, and whole grains
Add 30-45 minutes daily mixed cardio and mobility work
Screen for poor sleep quality and potential sleep apnea symptoms

medication_suggestions.name: Risk-factor targeted therapy
medication_suggestions.note: Medication depends on BP, lipid profile, and glucose status

actions: Follow balanced whole-food diet with portion control
Engage in regular physical activity at least 5 days/week
Maintain consistent sleep routine with 7-8 hours/night

medication_suggestions.name: Clinical evaluation needed
medication_suggestions.note: No direct protocol match, clinician-guided treatment required
